reviews.review_description:
Quite a lot of terms and conditions that you want players to agree to in order to play a game?
And a 45 character verification code to type into your headset from an email?
I tried again on your website but once you start in the headset...

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, and we’re sorry to hear about the trouble you experienced with signing up. As a workaround, please visit vulcanforged.com on a PC, create your account there, and then use those credentials to log in within the VR game. We appreciate your patience and hope you enjoy the game once you’re in!

If you encounter any other issues, feel free to reach out to us directly for further assistance

reviews.review_description: I've tried so many times and double checked my verification code but it would not let me in. I'm giving this game two stars because it looks good but it doesn't work for me.

developer_response.body:

reviews.review_description:
The game has several different modes that can please both casual and hardcore players. You can play with swords, spears or bows and you can face a variety of enemies and bosses.
I love it, it's by far my most played quest 3 game.

I love this game. Particularly close-combat which is a real workout when you get good at it - defending the crystal from demons attacking from all sides, really sweat inducing!
The main game is good fun too, working your way through the dungeons and halls of Tartarus and slaying demons and all sorts of monsters.
In my top-5 Meta Quest games.
